name: Outreach
description: Sync Outreach prospects, sequences, accounts, calls, and mailings into the Shielva knowledge base via OAuth2.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Your Outreach OAuth app Client ID
install_fields.help: Find your Client ID in Outreach → Settings → API → Apps.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Your Outreach OAuth app Client Secret
install_fields.help: Find your Client Secret in Outreach → Settings → API → Apps.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Must match the Redirect URI registered in your Outreach OAuth app. Leave blank to use the default.

methods.name: Install / Configure
methods.description: Validate that client_id and client_secret are present.

methods.name: Authorize (OAuth2)
methods.description: Build and return the OAuth2 authorization URL for the Outreach consent screen.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /api/v2/users/current and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Outreach prospects, sequences, and accounts into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Prospects
methods.description: Paginated list of Outreach prospects using JSON:API cursor pagination.

methods.name: Get Prospect
methods.description: Retrieve a single prospect by ID.
